---
name: Update / Improve existing feature
about: Describe changes when updating or improving an existing feature
title: "[UPDATE] <feature name>: short summary"
labels: enhancement, maintenance
assignees: ''
---

### Summary
Describe the change or improvement to the existing feature.

### Affected components
Which modules, cogs, tasks, or views will be changed?

### Motivation
Why is the update needed? What problem does it solve?

### Proposed changes
List the concrete code changes, new APIs, or behavior updates.

### Testing & validation
How should this be tested? Include steps, sample inputs, and expected outcomes.

### Rollout / deployment
Any feature flags, phased rollout, or configuration required?

### Backwards compatibility
Will this change break existing data or behavior? If so, how will you migrate users?

### Additional context
Links to related issues, PRs, or design notes.
